title: rubus trelleckensis
intro: Rubus trelleckensis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus trelleckensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus trelleckensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
